programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Herne Bay, Leezac hopes to create a modern home on a modest budget, but a steel beam's causing problems. Alice hits a brick wall with her Somerset townhouse.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Jay Slater
programme.desc: Within hours of Jay Slater's disappearance in the summer of 2024, mass online interest set conspiracy theories flying. This is the exclusive story of Jay's death and its extreme aftermath.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The case of the brutal murder of 86-year-old Una Crown in 2013 is re-opened. Police think they know the killer but will the science back them up.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Forensics get a partial DNA match to a previous suspect, and officers bring him in for questioning. After 13 years of denial will he finally confess.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers check out all the best TV from early 2025 in this special episode.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller with Simu Liu. When a trap for the enemy goes sideways, Alexander surprises The Orphanage by going off-book. But this time, it could cost him everything.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller. Alexander faces an impossible choice - and The Orphanage must decide if he has betrayed them.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Andi and Neil dream of retiring to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Can Laura Hamilton find their perfect place close to the coastal town of Mazarrón, near Murcia, for £145,000.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jennifer McGirr hosts at Tower View Hotel in Blackpool, where there are unwanted guests in a bathroom and trouble at breakfast time when some of Jennifer's guests try to order off-menu.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Daniel welcomes his rivals to Church Spa in East Markham, Nottinghamshire. Some of his guests are impressed by the spa facilities, while others are less smitten with the price tag.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Lisa host at the King's Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex. Their guests get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone has a solid night's sleep.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former GMTV presenter Matt Arnold hosts at the Bridge Hotel in Brandon, Suffolk, where he hopes his 'blissful beds, beautiful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' will impress his guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time, to confront their rivals and discover how much they've been paid. Things get heated when it's time to count up the cash.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Cedarwood Holidays in Cornwall, where Kirstie and Joe's pristine glamping pods and a chance to feed seals go down a treat. Will things stay flawless at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers are still in Cornwall for the week's second visit, at The Llawnroc Hotel, where former Redcoats Craig and Rachel are banking on being able to keep their guests entertained.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's a hat-trick! The B&Bers spend a third consecutive visit in Cornwall, at ex-military man Jo's The Olde Malthouse, where he's hoping to wow his guests with his B&B's heritage charm.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Dorset for the week's final visit, at The Britannia Inn, run by Hannah and Lee. The controversial pricing at breakfast leaves one guest with a sour taste.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day, and time to find out who's won. It's been a week of vitriol, with lots of B&Bers choosing not to return to the others' establishments. Will it all kick off? Probably.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet a mum and son restoring a historic windmill, and Sandy and Andy, who plan to open a glamping site on their farm.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet author and broadcaster Bob Flowerdew in Norfolk, where Henry eyes up a pinball machine from a damp shed. But will it ever work again.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Birmingham, the lads fall out over a bench that Henry thinks is worth something. Who'll have the last laugh.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Martin and Mandy want to make the permanent move to Mayenne in France. Can Jean Johansson find them, their three motorbikes and two prized parrots their forever home for £50k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Marcia and Ron love Crete's climate, beautiful beaches and the friendly people, and dream of owning a holiday home there. Can Lee Juggurnauth make their wishes a reality for their £255k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Jan and Chris look for a dream holiday home in Almería, Spain. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for £150k that works for both of their families.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: The kennel takes a shot on Bulut, a stray Malinois who showed up in the night. Can Bailey the cocker spaniel meet expectations? And is it second time lucky for Moose the Staffy.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: Action thriller starring Gerard Butler as an airline pilot who becomes a one-man army after crash landing on an island overrun by bad guys. To survive, he's gonna have to wing it.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To free his kidnapped daughter, an ex US commando must agree to assassinate a South American president. But he's not as pliant as he seems..

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller with Simu Liu. Hunted by his own agency, and with his body betraying him, can Alexander stay alive long enough to save those he loves the most.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Series finale of the spy thriller. As Alexander races against the clock, Parker discovers a secret message hiding in plain sight..

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George visits a handsome, turn-of-the-century terrace home, whose new owners are set on a monochrome colour scheme, and a workshop that makes antique-effect mirrors.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers meet all the colourful characters involved in race day at Hexham's scenic racecourse. And Janice gets involved in training dogs with the emergency services.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Financial pressures mount for Amanda and Nick at their Spanish guesthouse. And can Colin and Helen drum up more bookings in Portugal.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jon reaches a big milestone with his health. But with the garden wall still not finished and Jasmine getting called away for a job, it's all work and no play for Jon.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mette and Chris from Brighton have £220,000 to spend on a holiday home to enjoy with their two children on Mallorca's north coast. Scarlette Douglas lines up five fantastic options.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Jan and Chris look for a dream holiday home in Almería, Spain. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for £150k that works for both of their families.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie's unfinished apartment gets their hearts racing as their decadent Valentine's event approaches. Mark and Sandra juggle a gîte renovation and tractor lessons.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back on some clever builds. In Surrey, Pippa's sick of her 'tatty little bungalow'. Can Kirstie help her fall back in love with her home.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hotel duty manager Andrew welcomes his guests to a hotel-themed night, with 'five-star' food including 'early reservation fishcakes' and a 'do not disturb truffle'.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition, cocky fitness fanatic Jonny plans a meaty menu. And his guests get to see more of him than they bargained for..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sheepdog trainer Katy divides opinion with her prawns cooked on an open fire and her potent home-made horseradish sauce. But her shepherding demonstration is a hit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Holly shows her love of her county by serving Cumbrian scallops and chorizo followed by Cumberland sausage. But her Penrith fudge pudding is too much for some.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition, estate agent Wendy organises a Friday night disco with some surprises for her guests.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Herne Bay, Leezac hopes to create a modern home on a modest budget, but a steel beam's causing problems. Alice hits a brick wall with her Somerset townhouse.
